name: hb_1_6
requirements: As part of your analysis, for Ligong station (离宫) on 2025-06-01 compute and store: mean_pm25, max_pm25, mean_aqi (float), exceedance_hours (PM2.5>75, int), peak_pm25_hour_of_day (0-23, int).

turns.query: Analyze the pollution patterns at air quality station: Ligong on 2025-06-01.
